properties.name: expand-mode
properties.description: Determines if multiple items or a single item can opened at once

properties.name: heading
properties.description: Sets the text for the heading

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the custom element should have. See the Vivid Icon Gallery for available icons and icon-names

properties.name: meta
properties.description: Sets the meta text for the heading

properties.name: no-indicator
properties.description: Hides the open state indicator icon (chevron)

events.name: change
events.description: Fires a custom 'change' event when the button is invoked

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Add an icon to the component

methods.name: closeAll
methods.description: When `expand-mode` is set to `multi`, closes all the accordion items from the open state.
